measurability.reason: No commitments were extracted for Methane Reduction Targets.

gap_findings.description: South Korea's NDC does not mention methane reduction targets.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 SPM: reducing methane ~34% by 2030 vs 2020 buys near-term warming relief and is cost-effective.
